params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME deals combat damage to a player, exile it and the top card of your library in a face-down pile, shuffle that pile, then manifest those cards. (To manifest a card, put it onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature. You may turn it face up at any time for its mana cost if it is a creature card.)

params.Description: CARDNAME can't be blocked as long as you control no other creatures.
